name: Stella & Chewy's Wild Red Chicken & Beef Stew Wet Food + Stella's Super Beef Meal Mixers Freeze-Dried Dog Food Topper
description: Stella & Chewy's Wild Red Grain-Free Chicken & Beef Stew Wet Dog Food, 10-oz can, case of 6—Your furry friend will be taking a walk on the wild side after feasting on Stella & Chewy's Wild Red Grain-Free Chicken & Beef Stew Wet Dog Food. This protein-packed food is crafted with multiple meat sources, including shredded chicken and beef in a whisker-licking good broth—plus, the “whole prey” approach to creating a wholesome meal means muscle meat, organ meat, and cartilage are all used. Better yet, it’s free of artificial ingredients, fillers, preservatives, grains, and potatoes. Give your pup the flavor he craves and the nutrition he needs!
